nasb.text: They said to them, “We cannot do this thing, to give our sister to one who is uncircumcised, for that would be a disgrace to us.

esv.text: They said to them, “We cannot do this thing, to give our sister to one who is uncircumcised, for that would be a disgrace to us.

cnv.text: 對他們說：“我們不能把妹妹給一個沒有受割禮的人為妻，因為那是我們的恥辱。

ccb.text: “我们不能把妹妹嫁给没有受过割礼的人，这对我们是一种羞辱。

csbs.text: 对他们说：“把我们的妹妹交给一个未受割礼的人，我们不能做这样的事，因为这对我们是一种羞辱。
